---
title: "Satvik Raman"
about:
    id: hero-heading
    template: solana
    image-shape: rounded
    links:
        - icon: github
          text: Github
          href: https://github.com/satvikraman
        - icon: linkedin
          text: LinkedIn
          href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/satvik-raman-bb3841407
        - icon: share
          text: Share
          href: satvikraman.github.io
format:
    html:
        page-layout: full
lightbox: auto
---
#####
:::{#hero-heading}
![](/assets/profile/satvik_photo_20230101.jpg){.right-align width=15%}
I am a Grade 12 student at Sri Kumaran's Children's Home School, Bengaluru, with a passion for economics and mathematics. My desire to understand how businesses operate and how financial systems shape our world drives my academic journey. I intend to pursue these fields at the undergraduate level and build my career around them. 

I believe in applying what I learn to the real world. I have been programming since my sixth grade and frequently build automations to streamline tasks and aid decision-making. I am deeply committed to social equity. Inspired by my upbringing in a polyglot family, my community service focuses on breaking down language and economic barriers, using technology, to create equal opportunities for underserved groups.

Sports is equally central to my identity. I have represented my school in football and table tennis at the state and national level CBSE cluster tournaments. I have also played club-level football for the last three years with Young Blue Elite FC  [Bengaluru FC Soccer School](https://www.instagram.com/bfcsoccerschools/?hl=en){target="_blank"}, across their U17, U18, and U19 teams. 

Sports has taught me to value discipline, dedication, teamwork, and strategic thinking. I do my best to cross-pollinate these learnings for my academic and personal growth.
:::

## Education
Sri Kumaran's Children's Home school | Bengaluru

## 🏆 Awards and Recognitions

::: {.awards-container}

::: {.award-item}
<div class="award-text">
### State level CBSE clusters TT tournament - 2020 - Runners Up
<p>I represented my school at the state level CBSE clusters competition and we came runners up.</p>
</div>
![](/assets/profile/TT-State-2020-2nd.jpeg){.award-image}
:::

::: {.award-item}
<div class="award-text">
### Google Code To Learn - 2019 - Winner
<p>Created an Android application. [Video demo](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M2hzPp6bmkQ)</p>
</div>
![](/assets/profile/Google-Code-To-Learn.jpeg){.award-image}
:::

::: {.award-item}
<div class="award-text">
### National level CBSE clusters TT tournament - 2020
<p>I represented my school at the national level. The competition was held in Noorpur, Uttar Pradesh.</p>
</div>
![](/assets/profile/TT-National-2019-Paticipation.jpeg){.award-image}
:::

::: {.award-item}
<div class="award-text">
### State level CBSE clusters TT tournament - 2019 - Winner
<p>We won the state level competition and were selected to compete at the national level.</p>
</div>
![](/assets/profile/TT-State-2019-1st.jpeg){.award-image}
:::

:::

## 📜 Certifications

::: {.awards-container}

::: {.award-item}
<div class="award-text">
### German A2
<p>I cleared the A2 level German language proficiency test in 2023.</p>
</div>
![](/assets/profile/German-A2.jpeg){.award-image}
:::

::: {.award-item}
<div class="award-text">
### German A1
<p>I cleared the A1 level German language proficiency test in 2022.</p>
</div>
![](/assets/profile/German-A1.jpeg){.award-image}
:::

:::
